articles.title: Mistrial declared after report that Conn. girl killed in 1986 had been placed in used body bag
articles.description:
News about the body bag came from Henry Lee, the forensic scientist known for his work on the O.J. Simpson murder case and other high-profile crimes across the country.

The post Mistrial declared after report that Conn. girl killed in 1986 had been placed in used body bag appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Mistrial declared in Connecticut murder case due to body bag evidence on April 6, 2026.
Forensic scientist Henry Lee revealed the girl was placed in a used body bag.
This revelation raises concerns about forensic practices affecting justice in nearby Boston.

articles.title: Alex Cora reshuffles Red Sox lineup, drops Trevor Story out of No. 2 spot
articles.description:
Trevor Story was bumped down to the No. 5 spot in Boston's batting order after a rough start to the 2026 season.

The post Alex Cora reshuffles Red Sox lineup, drops Trevor Story out of No. 2 spot appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Alex Cora reshuffles Red Sox lineup, moving Trevor Story to No. 5 spot.
Trevor Story's batting average dropped significantly at the start of the 2026 season.
This change aims to improve team performance for Boston fans and local attendance.
